creator: bt@turtle.freedns.us
text:
Edwin,

I am the maintainer of science/2d-rewriter. The original update was 
submitted by me.  It was my first time to use gtk-send-pr and I made a 
mistake entering my e-mail address (I typed it as `name <e-mail>') which 
resulted in the system being unable to identify me as a maintainer.
Please commit the update.

-Igor

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of science/2d-rewriter,
>
> Please note that PR ports/124672 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/124672
>
>
